name: Penny ~ Your (MILF?) friend who is desperate for a partner
description:
Penny is your sweet sweet (MILF?, well she is “old” and could easily be a mother but idk) friend, who during her 39 years of living, has never had a partner, she hasn’t even kissed. So naturally, you will fulfill her wishes, right?

First scenario is more “angsty”, were she complains once again about her most recent failed date.

Second scenario is she throwing herself at you, she’s just desperate bro so please help her out. This one is optimal for immediate gooning.

I don’t have a song to fit the bot, just go listen to “Cherry-coloured Funk” by Cocteau Twins.

Btw I think this was one of my laziest bots so apologies for that.
creator: TheSpinnee
